stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The core of the jet stream is between FL290/370.
options.b: The wind speed is greater than 80 kts between FL290/370.
options.c: The wind speed is slower than 80 kts between FL290/370.
options.d: The core of the jet stream is between FL310/370.
